# vLLM Ascend Plugin
> vLLM Ascend is a community-maintained hardware plugin for running vLLM on Huawei Ascend NPUs.

Official repository: https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend
Documentation: https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/

## Getting Started
- [Installation](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/installation/): environment preparation and installation methods.
- [Quick Start](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/quick_start/): first successful serve and inference flow.
- [Model Tutorials](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/tutorials/models/): model-specific guides.
- [Feature Tutorials](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/tutorials/features/): feature-focused walkthroughs.
- [Hardware Tutorials](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/tutorials/hardwares/): hardware-specific setup and usage.
- [FAQs](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/faqs/): common issues and troubleshooting.

## Requirements
- Hardware: Atlas 800I A2 Inference, Atlas A2 Training, Atlas 800I A3 Inference, Atlas A3 Training, Atlas 300I Duo (Experimental).
- For software and version requirements, follow the official Installation and Release Notes pages.

## User Guide
- [Supported Models](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/user_guide/support_matrix/supported_models/): list of supported models and features.
- [Configuration](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/user_guide/configuration/): environment variables and configuration options.
- [Feature Guide](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/user_guide/feature_guide/): detailed feature usage guides.
- [Release Notes](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/user_guide/release_notes/): version history and changes.

## Developer Guide
- [Contributing](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/developer_guide/contribution/): how to contribute to vLLM Ascend.
- [Design Documents](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/developer_guide/Design_Documents/): internal design documentation.
- [Evaluation](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/developer_guide/evaluation/): accuracy evaluation tools and methods.
- [Performance and Debug](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/): performance benchmarking and debugging guides.

## Community
- [Governance](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/community/governance/): project governance.
- [Contributors](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/community/contributors/): list of contributors.
